productDisplayName: Nautica Men White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a steel round case Dial style: White dial with black hands Strap style: Brown genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Three chronograph time displays and day apeture on the 6 hour mark Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
